属性は水。氷雪、氷河期にまつわる災禍を\n具現化した厄災。氷雪の階層に生息し、\: Attribute: Water. A Calamity that materializes disasters related to ice, snow, and glacial eras. It inhabits the ice and snow strata, moving through the ground beneath the snow. Since its appearance in the strata of the Abyss, it has caused abnormal weather as far as the Abyss's surroundings and frontline bases, bringing unseasonable blizzards and a world of ice.
属性は闇。飢えと枯れにまつわる災禍を\n具現化した厄災。周囲の植物を枯らし、\n: Attribute: Darkness. A Calamity that materializes disasters related to hunger and blight. It withers surrounding plants, starves living creatures to death, and brings crop failure and famine. It was the first Calamity to appear immediately after the Abyss emerged, inflicting massive damage on the Allied Expedition and the areas around the Abyss. Though the Three Nations succeeded in repelling it once through their cooperation, it later amassed power in a certain stratum of the Abyss and has repeatedly brought its threat before humanity.

It appears under the guise of saving the souls of the dead suffering in despair, summoning them to the heavens. However, its actions are not salvation but the annihilation of all. The land where the Angel Calamity descends transforms into a world of nothingness, devoid of any trace of life.
